---
title: Publications
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  contents: publications.yaml
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: "YYYY"
  fields: [title, date, Authors, Journal]
---

```{r}
#| output: false
library(tidyverse)

# ── Parse RIS file ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ris_lines <- read_lines("files/Exported Items.ris")

records <- list()
current <- list(authors = character())

for (line in ris_lines) {
  if (nchar(trimws(line)) == 0) next
  if (nchar(line) < 6) next

  tag   <- substr(line, 1, 2)
  value <- trimws(substr(line, 7, nchar(line)))

  if (startsWith(line, "ER  -")) {
    if (!is.null(current$title)) records <- append(records, list(current))
    current <- list(authors = character())
  } else if (tag == "TY") current$type    <- value
  else if (tag == "TI")   current$title   <- value
  else if (tag == "T2")   current$journal <- value
  else if (tag == "PY")   current$year    <- value
  else if (tag == "DO")   current$doi     <- value
  else if (tag == "AU")   current$authors <- c(current$authors, value)
}

# ── Format a single author: "Lastname, Firstname M" → "Lastname FM" ─────────
fmt_author <- function(au) {
  parts    <- str_split(au, ",", n = 2)[[1]]
  family   <- trimws(parts[1])
  given    <- if (length(parts) > 1) trimws(parts[2]) else ""
  initials <- str_extract_all(given, "(?:^|(?<=\\s))[A-ZÁÉÍÓÚÑ]")[[1]] |>
    str_c(collapse = "")
  if (nchar(initials) == 0) family else str_c(family, " ", initials)
}

fmt_authors <- function(aus) {
  formatted <- map_chr(aus, fmt_author)
  # Bold the PI's name (handle accent variant)
  formatted <- str_replace(formatted, "^G[oó]mez\\b", "**Gómez**")
  # Truncate long lists
  if (length(formatted) > 7) formatted <- c(formatted[1:7], "et al.")
  str_c(formatted, collapse = ", ")
}

# ── Build tidy data frame — keep only YOUR papers ────────────────────────────
is_my_paper <- function(r) {
  any(str_detect(r$authors, regex("G[oó]mez", ignore_case = TRUE)))
}

pubs <- map(records, function(r) {
  # Skip dissertations and papers you're not on
  if (!is.null(r$type) && r$type == "MANSCPT") return(NULL)
  if (!is_my_paper(r)) return(NULL)

  # Clean DOI
  doi_clean <- if (!is.null(r$doi)) {
    r$doi |>
      str_remove("^https?://doi\\.org/") |>
      str_remove("^https?://")
  } else NA_character_

  path <- if (!is.na(doi_clean) && nchar(doi_clean) > 0 && !startsWith(doi_clean, "http")) {
    str_c("https://doi.org/", doi_clean)
  } else if (!is.na(doi_clean) && startsWith(doi_clean, "http")) {
    doi_clean
  } else ""

  tibble(
    title   = r$title   %||% "",
    Authors = fmt_authors(r$authors),
    Journal = r$journal %||% "",
    date    = if (!is.null(r$year)) str_c(r$year, "-01-01") else "1900-01-01",
    path    = path
  )
}) |> compact() |> list_rbind() |> arrange(desc(date))

# ── Write YAML (use paste0 to guarantee indentation) ─────────────────────────
yaml_entries <- pubs |> pmap_chr(function(title, Authors, Journal, date, path) {
  title_esc <- str_replace_all(title, '"', '\\"')
  auth_esc  <- str_replace_all(Authors, '"', '\\"')
  journ_esc <- str_replace_all(Journal, '"', '\\"')
  paste0(
    '- title: "',   title_esc, '"\n',
    '  Authors: "', auth_esc,  '"\n',
    '  Journal: "', journ_esc, '"\n',
    '  date: ',     date,      '\n',
    '  path: ',     path,      '\n'
  )
})

write_lines(yaml_entries, "publications.yaml")
```
